2603.20836.title: MERIT: Multi-domain Efficient RAW Image Translation
2603.20836.paper_summary: RAW images captured by different camera sensors exhibit substantial domain shifts due to varying spectral responses, noise characteristics, and tone behaviors, complicating their direct use in downstream computer vision tasks. Prior methods address this problem by training domain-specific RAW-to-RAW translators for each source-target pair, but such approaches do not scale to real-world scenarios involving multiple types of commercial cameras. In this work, we introduce MERIT, the first unified framework for multi-domain RAW image translation, which leverages a single model to perform translations across arbitrary camera domains. To address domain-specific noise discrepancies, we propose a sensor-aware noise modeling loss that explicitly aligns the signal-dependent noise statistics of the generated images with those of the target domain. We further enhance the generator with a conditional multi-scale large kernel attention module for improved context and sensor-aware feature modeling. To facilitate standardized evaluation, we introduce MDRAW, the first dataset tailored for multi-domain RAW image translation, comprising both paired and unpaired RAW captures from five diverse camera sensors across a wide range of scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MERIT outperforms prior models in both quality (5.56 dB improvement) and scalability (80% reduction in training iterations).
2603.20836.paper_summary_zh: RAW影像由不同相機感測器捕捉，因為光譜響應、噪聲特性和色調行為的差異，顯示出顯著的領域轉變，這使得它們在下游計算機視覺任務中的直接使用變得複雜。先前的方法通過為每個源-目標對訓練特定領域的RAW到RAW翻譯器來解決這個問題，但這種方法無法擴展到涉及多種類型商業相機的現實場景。在這項工作中，我們介紹了MERIT，第一個統一的多領域RAW影像翻譯框架，它利用單一模型在任意相機領域之間進行翻譯。為了解決特定領域的噪聲差異，我們提出了一種感測器感知的噪聲建模損失，明確地將生成影像的信號依賴噪聲統計與目標領域的對齊。我們進一步增強生成器，加入條件多尺度大核注意力模組，以改善上下文和感測器感知特徵建模。為了促進標準化評估，我們推出了MDRAW，第一個針對多領域RAW影像翻譯量身定制的數據集，包含來自五個不同相機感測器的配對和未配對RAW捕捉，涵蓋廣泛的場景。大量實驗表明，MERIT在質量（提高5.56 dB）和可擴展性（訓練迭代減少80%）上均優於先前的模型。
2603.20836.author: Wenjun Huang et.al.
2603.20836.authors: Wenjun Huang, Shenghao Fu, Yian Jin, Yang Ni, Ziteng Cui, Hanning Chen, Yirui He, Yezi Liu, Sanggeon Yun, SungHeon Jeong, Ryozo Masukawa, William Youngwoo Chung, Mohsen Imani
